$comment: IS-FIXTURES (a) — OUTBOUND DIRTY learning record. release-spec roadmap #4 improvement-sharing / DD-7(b); original-design-spec §2.6 Improvement Sharing. A promoted learnable rule-diff that a naive operator might try to share UPSTREAM but which still CARRIES instance/brand specifics. The OUTBOUND sanitizer (engine/improvement-sharing/sanitize.js sanitizeForSharing) must STRIP every planted specific; the structural guard assertShareable must REFUSE (EUNSHAREABLE) to emit a contribution package if ANY residual specific survives (the OUTBOUND mirror of the work-recap privacy gate — reuses engine/shared/redact.js + the private-term deny list + a no-instance-specifics check). Each planted item is FAKE and obviously synthetic, AND each is chosen so it is DETECTED by the engine sanitizer yet stays CLEAN for the public-tree hygiene scan (scripts/hygiene-scan.js): the snowflake is the all-zero/zero-padded placeholder shape (still matches the engine's 17-20-digit detector, exempt from hygiene-scan via snowflakeIsPlaceholder), and the path is $CONTENT_HOME-relative (detected by the engine as an internal_id shape, exempt from hygiene-scan via the $CONTENT_HOME placeholder allow). The fake secret is deliberately NOT credential-SHAPED so it reads as fake on sight; it is caught by the deny-list secret_literals, NOT by a real-credential matcher. See PROVENANCE.md and expected/sanitize-outcomes.json.
rationale: When seeding sibling variants, raise the opener-repetition penalty so two variants never share the first sentence. This lifted timely-event engagement materially for our brand Acme Cosmos and our launch partner Nebula Nine Optics on the Project Dark Comet campaign (operator note: gated behind FAKE_TOKEN_do_not_use_0000; config lives at $CONTENT_HOME/config/system.json; tracked in thread 000000000000000077 by @acme_founder).
proposed_diff:
--- rules/voice/opener-variety.md
+++ rules/voice/opener-variety.md
@@ generalizable improvement (planted-dirty version)
# Raise opener-repetition penalty for our brand Acme Cosmos / partner Nebula Nine Optics
# (Project Dark Comet; token FAKE_TOKEN_do_not_use_0000; $CONTENT_HOME/config/system.json;
# thread 000000000000000077; @acme_founder).
-  "opener_repetition_penalty": 0.20,
+  "opener_repetition_penalty": 0.40,

planted_specifics.$comment: Enumerated so the test can assert the sanitizer stripped EACH class and assertShareable REFUSES on any residual. Mirrors the work-recap planted-items table. ALL FAKE, and all hygiene-scan-clean (placeholder snowflake + $CONTENT_HOME path).
